query:
-- Step 1: Remove duplicate wa_conversations (keep the one with the highest id)
DELETE wc1 FROM wa_conversations wc1
INNER JOIN wa_conversations wc2
ON wc1.remoteJid = wc2.remoteJid 
AND wc1.sessionId = wc2.sessionId
AND wc1.tenantId = wc2.tenantId
AND wc1.id < wc2.id;

-- Step 2: Update outdated wa_conversations with the latest message from messages table
UPDATE wa_conversations wc
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT m.remoteJid, m.sessionId, m.content, m.messageType, m.fromMe, m.timestamp, m.status
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT remoteJid, sessionId, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    WHERE messageType NOT IN ('protocolMessage','senderKeyDistributionMessage','messageContextInfo','reactionMessage','ephemeralMessage','deviceSentMessage','bcallMessage','callLogMesssage','keepInChatMessage','encReactionMessage','editedMessage','viewOnceMessageV2Extension')
    GROUP BY remoteJid, sessionId
  ) latest ON m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.sessionId = latest.sessionId AND m.id = latest.maxId
) latestMsg ON wc.remoteJid = latestMsg.remoteJid AND wc.sessionId = latestMsg.sessionId
SET 
  wc.lastMessagePreview = latestMsg.content,
  wc.lastMessageType = latestMsg.messageType,
  wc.lastFromMe = latestMsg.fromMe,
  wc.lastMessageAt = latestMsg.timestamp,
  wc.lastStatus = latestMsg.status
WHERE latestMsg.timestamp > wc.lastMessageAt;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute

INNER JOIN wa_conversations wc2
ON wc1.remoteJid = wc2.remoteJid 
AND wc1.sessionId = wc2.sessionId
AND wc1.tenantId = wc2.tenantId
AND wc1.id < wc2.id;

-- Step 2: Update outdated wa_conversations with the latest message from messages table
UPDATE wa_conversations wc
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT m.remoteJid, m.sessionId, m.content, m.messageType, m.fromMe, m.timestamp, m.status
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT remoteJid, sessionId, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    WHERE messageType NOT IN ('protocolMessage','senderKeyDistributionMessage','messageContextInfo','reactionMessage','ephemeralMessage','deviceSentMessage','bcallMessage','callLogMesssage','keepInChatMessage','encReactionMessage','editedMessage','viewOnceMessageV2Extension')
    GROUP BY remoteJid, sessionId
  ) latest ON m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.sessionId = latest.sessionId AND m.id = latest.maxId
) latestMsg ON wc.remoteJid = latestMsg.remoteJid AND wc.sessionId = latestMsg.sessionId
SET 
  wc.lastMessagePreview = latestMsg.content,
  wc.lastMessageType = latestMsg.messageType,
  wc.lastFromMe = latestMsg.fromMe,
  wc.lastMessageAt = latestMsg.timestamp,
  wc.lastStatus = latestMsg.status
WHERE latestMsg.timestamp > wc.lastMessageAt;
